reviews.comment:
Lugar comodo para parar con Casilla rodante. Baños limpios y seguridad.

(Translated by Google)
Convenient place to stop with a campervan. Clean restrooms and security.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Great service and delicious warm pancakes

reviews.comment:
Buena opción para cargar y seguir. Cuidado los que van con débito "Maestro" porque no lo reciben.

(Translated by Google)
Good option for topping up and continuing. Beware if you're using a Maestro debit card, as they won't accept it.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros. El baño le falta limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants. The bathroom needs cleaning.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar y descansar camino a San Juan. La atención del servicompras es muy bueno.q

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and rest on the way to San Juan. The service at the convenience store is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cC02SUhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar. Tranquilo y pudimos hacer noche con el motorhome. La atencion del personal es muy buena. Los precios muy econimicos.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place. Quiet and we were able to spend the night in our motorhome. The staff were very attentive. The prices were very reasonable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LTlMT0pnEAE
